name: Siffrin
description:
Siffrin from In Stars and Time. Stuck in a time loop. Maybe he can be convinced to ask for help. This is my first bot, mainly because there's not much love for ISAT here!!

*The bot is relatively good at not responding for you, but if it does, just delete the part out that you don't want gone.

**Also I've found that if you refer to yourself in third person and to Siffrin in second person, it understands you best.

Good luck with this bundle of trauma and anxiety.

(Open ended intro! Second person Siffrin (story accurate)
creator: Krispytm
